decisions.question: Chain walking + implementation form: generic upstream-chain walker vs. hardcoded sequence; shell script vs. directive prose.
Compression strategy: what constitutes removable boilerplate in each artifact type, and how to strip safely.
decisions.chosen: Strip Implementation Issues from DESIGN; leave PRD body untouched

decisions.question: Utilities sharing: how shirabe reimplements logic from private tools/ci scripts without a runtime dependency.
decisions.chosen: Inline utilities in the cascade script
